data.name: Easter Bunny Girls – Hentai Jigsaw
data.detailed_description:
Easter has never been this tempting.

In Easter Bunny Girls – Hentai Jigsaw, enter a colorful world where charming bunny girls, themed environments, and vibrant illustrations turn every puzzle into a delightful visual experience.

Complete 30 exclusive high-resolution artworks inspired by the Easter universe: delicate bunny ears, themed outfits, decorated eggs, magical scenery, and elegant poses full of personality.

Each puzzle reveals a new visual fantasy:
soft pastel tones, gentle lighting, delicate details, and characters designed to deliver charm and style with every completed image.

Game Features:

🥚 30 exclusive high-quality illustrations
🐰 Easter-inspired visual theme
🧩 Three difficulty levels
✨ Light and relaxing interface
🎀 Vibrant sensual cartoon-style artwork
📥 Download all unlocked images

Perfect for players who enjoy relaxing puzzles and stylish visual collections in a sweet, playful, and charming atmosphere.

data.short_description: In Easter Bunny Girls – Hentai Jigsaw, Easter becomes irresistibly tempting. Assemble sensual puzzles featuring charming bunny girls, delicate costumes, and 30 exclusive artworks full of color, style, and soft seduction — piece by piece. 🐰💖
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
